# JSX email

> JSX email provides React and TypeScript components and helpers for building responsive, standards-compliant email templates compatible with modern email clients.

Use these docs for JSX email component APIs, CLI usage, rendering, compilation, plugins, Tailwind support, preview tooling, and provider integration guidance.

## Documentation Sets

- [Complete documentation](https://jsx.email/llms-full.txt): Full JSX email documentation as Markdown.
- [Compact documentation](https://jsx.email/llms-small.txt): Compact JSX email documentation outline.

## Notes

- Generated from the official JSX email documentation.
- Prefer the full docs file for complete context and the small docs file for a compact outline.

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/shellscape/jsx-email): Source repository for JSX email.
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/jsx-email): jsx-email package on npm.
